Name: Scituate Rotary Farmers Market
Description:
The Scituate Rotary Farmers Market is run by a volunteer committee and 100 percent of set up fees go to charity. Our farmers are local, and most farms are located only a few miles from the market.  The market has special events each week.  We have
25-30 vendors, live music, special events, food trucks, we feature a different local author each week, and the best good vibes around.  We are located in a beautiful setting near the Scituate Reservoir.
Address: 46 Institute Lane, North Scituate, Rhode Island 02857
